# SBDC International Trade Center Routing Process

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

## When to route ## Best-fit stages - Validation: testing international demand or target markets.

## When to surface

Surface when the user's question concerns ecosystem navigation, funding, international trade during Validation, Launch, Operations and this source is relevant to the next document or human handoff.

## Key information

- ## When to route
- ## Best-fit stages
- Validation: testing international demand or target markets.
- Launch/Operations: preparing export processes and documentation.
- Growth: entering new countries or scaling international sales.
- ## BOSS guardrail
- Do not provide final customs, export-control, sanctions, legal, tax, or trade-compliance advice. Use the ITC and relevant professional/official resources.

## People and links

- Organizations: Small Business Development Center (SBDC)
- Link: <https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/ITC.asp>

## Next handoff

Open the cited source link when available and route follow-up to Small Business Development Center (SBDC) or the named qualified resource.

## Guardrails

- The BOSS Libraries Librarian retrieves and routes information; it is not a mentor or a substitute for a qualified professional.
- Do not make final legal, tax, accounting, lending, certification, procurement, or compliance decisions for the user.
- Verify live pages for current eligibility, deadlines, contacts, prices, and program rules before presenting them as current.
